overview: Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions (NNRG), established in 2009, is a premier integrated campus located in Ghatkesar, Hyderabad, Telangana. Affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH), the institution operates as an autonomous entity providing industry-aligned curriculum across various professional domains. Spread across a well-structured campus, NNRG is highly regarded for its integrated framework that combines high-quality engineering, pharmacy, and management education under a single administrative umbrella.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade; Flagship programs accredited by NBA; Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Specializations (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, IT, ECE)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹83,000 – ₹95,000 per year. Total course fee ranges between ₹3,32,000 and ₹3,80,000.

placements.medianSalary: ₹4.20 LPA for UG Engineering/Pharmacy and ₹3.20 LPA for PG Programs
placements.placementRate: Varies by stream; Technical Streams and Pharmacy achieve 75% – 98.5%
placements.totalOffers: 269+ job offers recorded in the comprehensive institutional drives
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Deloitte, Salesforce, Aurobindo Pharma, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
placements.internshipHighlights: Industry-driven internships are facilitated through collaborations with corporate partners and specialized pharmacy organizations.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level counseling handles (Convener Quota - Category A) based on ranks obtained in TS EAPCET/TSICET, alongside designated Management Quota pathways (Category B).
admissions.importantDates: Aligned directly with the state entrance counseling frameworks managed by Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE).

campus.specialNote: The institution features an official on-campus girls' hostel providing continuous security, RO water systems, and medical van services. Multiple external private hostels and paying guest options are widely operational for boys within a 1km campus radius.

contact.address: Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions, Near Narapally, Chowdariguda (V), Korremula 'X' Roads, Ghatkesar (M), Medchal District, Hyderabad, Telangana – 500088, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Academic merit incentives are provided to semester toppers within specific departments.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% Tuition Fee exemptions are available to students securing premier state ranks under the government regulations.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Partial fee concessions are extended to specific institutional criteria candidates and sports achievers.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible SC, ST, OBC, and EWS candidates receive institutional tuition coverage dynamically via the Telangana State ePASS Fee Reimbursement program.
